name: NFTPort
description: NFT infrastructure API for minting, contract deployment and querying multi-chain NFT metadata, ownership and sales data.

seo.title: NFTPort — Backend-as-a-Service
seo.meta_description: NFTPort: NFT infrastructure API for minting, contract deployment and querying multi-chain NFT metadata, ownership and sales data.

when_to_use: NFT minting API across Ethereum and Polygon with one endpoint
Smart contract deployment for NFT collections without Solidity
Querying multi-chain NFT ownership and metadata via API
Building NFT marketplaces with unified cross-chain data
On-chain asset issuance for games and digital art platforms

pros: Good ownership and sales data access
cons: Pricing climbs quickly for high volume
review.verdict: Competent NFT infrastructure API, but the category's fortunes define its relevance right now.
review.best_for: Web3 teams building NFT products needing multi-chain minting and data without custom indexers
review.not_for: Non-NFT Web3 use cases or teams betting on long-tail chains

pricing.high_water_mark_reason: Freemium tier, no explicit peak-lock evidence
